backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor implementing the Ray Infotech MLM backend with user profile management, member registration (with RI-formatted IDs), commission tracking, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades the actor state by adding the `memberIdStr` field (RI-formatted ID) to all existing Member records when the canister is upgraded.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—member joining form with RI ID display and admin panel member list with RI ID column—to their source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose, covering pages, components, hooks, styles, and utilities for the Ray Infotech MLM frontend.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind layers and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Ray Infotech MLM' and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for home, register, dashboard, and admin pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider with Layout, ProfileSetupModal, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CommissionHistor: Card component that builds and displays a commission history table for a member, grouping downline members by tree depth (levels 1–9) and computing commissions at rates 9%–1% of total collection per level.
Displays a member's earnings breakdown (fee refund + multi-level commissions up to 9 levels) by traversing the downline tree and applying percentage rates per depth level.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component showing copyright year and a branded caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, role-based nav links (Dashboard, Register Member, Admin), and an Internet Identity login/logout button with mobile menu support.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wrapper layout component that composes Header, main content area, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/MatrixTreeVisual: Renders a visual 3-ary matrix tree up to a configurable depth, showing member cards with status indicators and empty slot placeholders.
frontend/src/components/PlatformStatisti: Computes and displays platform-wide stats (total members, fees collected, refunds issued, total commissions) in a responsive card grid with loading skeletons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name and contact info before proceeding.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentDeadl: Displays a card showing a member's recruitment deadline status (Met, Cancelled, or Active) with a live countdown timer, progress bar toward 3 direct downlines, and formatted timestamps.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching/saving user profiles, listing/getting members, registering members, and marking joining fees paid.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens using a deep navy and gold brand palette.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin-only page that lists all members in a searchable, paginated table with deadline status badges and a button to mark joining fees paid, with access guards for unauthenticated and non-admin users.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Authenticated dashboard page showing member stats, matrix tree visualization, commission history, and earnings summary, with member search and refresh functionality.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing landing page displaying the MLM commission structure (9 levels, 1–9%), hero section, and login/register call-to-action buttons.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Member registration form page with name, mobile, email, and optional sponsor ID fields, showing a success card with the new member ID on completion.
frontend/src/utils/deadlineHelpers.ts: Utility functions for formatting nanosecond timestamps, computing recruitment deadline status (Active/Met/Cancelled), and calculating time remaining until a deadline.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both regular and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom brand colors (navy and gold palettes), fonts, border radii, shadows, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the Ray Infotech MLM membership management web app, including existing features (member joining form, admin dashboard integration) and pending feature requests (unique RI-format member ID generation, backend registration logic).
